'''Acklay Chopper''' was a notorious [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] slavemaster and fight manager of the [[Petranaki arena]]. He gave combat training to gladiators and [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] who fought in the arenas of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. A scar ran down Acklay Chopper's right side, and he walked with a heavy limp.

==Biography==
Acklay Chopper was born into the [[Stalgasin hive/Legends|Stalgasin hive]] as a nameless and wingless drone. He served for a long time as a [[Petranaki/Legends|Petranaki]] gladiator, until he fought an [[Acklay/Legends|acklay]] in his final match. The acklay wounded him, but he recovered and [[Death/Legends|killed]] the animal with a thrust to the roof of its mouth. Cutting off the head of the acklay, he threw it to the watching [[Archduke/Legends|Archduke]] [[Hadiss/Legends|Hadiss the Vaulted]].<ref name="Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds" />

Acklay Chopper was rewarded with his new position. In addition to his regular duties, he would occasionally take his charges to the [[Ebon Sea]] to capture acklays to use in fights.<ref name="Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds" />
